summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of FISHTO seafood business website. All major sections, navigation, mobile responsiveness, and interactive features tested successfully.
passed_tests: ✅ Hero section renders with FISHTO brand name, tagline, and 2 CTA buttons
✅ Navigation bar with glassmorphism effect - all 7 nav links present and clickable
✅ Navbar becomes sticky with glass effect on scroll
✅ About section with image, content, floating '2022' badge, and 4 highlight cards
✅ Services section with all 6 service cards (Household, Hotel, Restaurant, Catering, Event, Custom)
✅ Why Choose Us section with dark background and all 6 reason cards
✅ Occasions section with all 6 occasion cards and CTA button
✅ CTA Banner section with parallax background and working buttons
✅ Testimonials carousel with prev/next buttons and dot navigation (5 testimonials)
✅ FAQ section with accordion functionality - all 7 FAQ items expand/collapse properly
✅ Contact form with all 6 fields, validation (error on empty name/phone), and success message
✅ Footer with FISHTO branding, 7 quick links, contact info, copyright, and scroll-to-top
✅ WhatsApp floating button visible in bottom-right with correct link
✅ Mobile responsive - hamburger menu toggle works, mobile menu with 7 nav links
✅ Smooth scroll navigation working for all anchor links
✅ All data-testid attributes present on interactive elements
✅ Phone numbers (9748465789) and email (support@fishto.in) correctly linked
✅ WhatsApp links properly formatted with correct number
